owner.comments: "mb-backlog is a personal application designed for managing and maintaining a personal backlog of tasks, projects, and ideas." - just tasks. drop projects and ideas. "The application provides users with a centralized platform to organize, prioritize, and track their personal work items." - it's a personal application. There will be only one user. "This requirements specification outlines the functional and non-functional requirements for version 1.1 of the mb-backlog application." The version of the specification is 1.1, but the version of the application is 1.0. "Facilitate task tracking and progress monitoring" - I don't know what this means. Reformulate or explain.
